_about: Project-authored overlay for the materials pipeline. data/materials/ is verbatim EDCD/FDevIDs (read-only); this file carries presentation + deferral that are NOT in the CSV. Consumed by materials_common.py. See docs/superpowers/specs/2026-06-30-edcd-reference-data-pipelines-design.md.
_display_note: Guardian/Thargoid materials (FDevIDs category=None) are captured in data/materials/ but not rendered on materials.html yet — see deferred_note. Listed explicitly so the deferral is auditable rather than implicit.
deferred_note: None-category (Guardian/Thargoid) materials and all Odyssey microresources (data/materials/microresources.csv) are captured in data/materials/ but not rendered on materials.html yet. Tracked for a future tech-broker / suit-materials display (data/README.md TODO).
